## Site
- Title: Abdul Basit — AI Engineer & Full-Stack Developer Portfolio
- URL: https://abdulbasit23415.vercel.app
- Language: English
- Author: Abdul Basit
- Contact: kashifabdulbasit@gmail.com
- Location: Lahore, Pakistan

## About
Abdul Basit is an AI Engineer and Full-Stack Developer based in Lahore, Pakistan, specializing in Large Language Models (LLMs), Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) pipelines, and intelligent web applications. He currently works at Excels Tech Solution LLC, developing AI-powered platforms, chatbots, and automation systems. He holds a BS in Data Science from Superior University (2022–2026).

## Skills
- AI & Machine Learning: TensorFlow, Keras, Scikit-learn, XGBoost, RAG, LLMs, OpenCV, MediaPipe
- Full-Stack: Next.js, React, TypeScript, Python, FastAPI, Flask, Node.js
- Databases: PostgreSQL, MongoDB, Supabase, SQLite, Pinecone
- Automation & DevOps: n8n, Docker, Git, Vercel, Playwright, Apify
- Data Science: Pandas, NumPy, Matplotlib, Seaborn

## Experience
- Junior AI Engineer @ Excels Tech Solution LLC (04/2026 – Present)
- Software Engineer @ Coding Caliber (3 Months)

## Projects
- AI Power Email: AI-powered email marketing platform (https://aipoweremail.com/)
- AI RAG Chatbot: Intelligent customer support using RAG + LLMs (https://airagchatbot.com)
- WhatsApp Business Chatbot: AI chatbot with webhook automation
- Hand Gesture Recognition: Real-time computer vision system using MediaPipe and CNNs
- Crypto Price Prediction: ML forecasting using LSTM, Random Forest, ANN
